archetype: Archetype 4: Swiss Precision / Archetype 5: Jewel Hybrid (Dark Mode)
philosophy: Transform the 'candy store' chaos into a sophisticated Enterprise Blockchain Command Center. Focus on high contrast, strict grid alignment, categorization of actions, and strictly monochromatic functional surfaces with a single electric accent color.

layout_strategy.spacing: Generous Spacing: p-6 or p-8 for inner card paddings.
layout_strategy.grid: Control Room Grid (Dashboard Mode): tight gaps (gap-4 or gap-6). Use 1px borders between cells rather than floating soft-shadow cards.
layout_strategy.alignment: Left-align dense text and actions. Center align only empty states or specific modal content.

header.description: Sleek utility bar. Clean up the 8+ nav links.
header.structure: Glassmorphism header (backdrop-blur-xl). Left: Logo. Right: A single Shadcn DropdownMenu triggered by the User Avatar containing (Plan, Security, Privacy, API, Org, Drafts, Log Out).
header.classes: sticky top-0 z-50 backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#0f1825]/80 border-b border-slate-800 px-6 py-4 flex justify-between items-center

stats_section.description: 3 metrics presented in a seamless grid without heavy card backgrounds.
stats_section.item_styles: p-8 border-r border-slate-800 last:border-r-0 hover:bg-slate-800/10 transition-colors flex flex-col gap-2

quick_actions_bento.description: Categorized Bento Grid to replace the 18+ colored button chaos.

sections.name: Core Actions
sections.styles: bg-[#162032] border border-slate-800 p-6 relative overflow-hidden group rounded-lg
sections.special_treatment: Use the abstract_texture image as a low-opacity background here. Give the 'Quick Seal' button a solid primary accent color.

quick_actions_bento.button_style: flex items-center gap-3 w-full p-3 text-sm text-slate-300 hover:text-white hover:bg-slate-800/50 rounded-md transition-all text-left border border-transparent hover:border-slate-700

requests_list.styles: mt-8 border border-slate-800 rounded-md overflow-hidden bg-[#0f1825]
requests_list.table_header: bg-slate-900 border-b border-slate-800 text-slate-400 font-mono text-xs uppercase tracking-wider h-10

user_avatar.description: Professional user headshot to place in the top right header dropdown trigger

abstract_texture.usage_instructions: Use as an absolutely positioned background image inside the 'Core Actions' bento card with opacity-10 and blend-mode-overlay.

interactions_and_motion.hover_states: All buttons MUST explicitly set hover text color (e.g. hover:text-white). Use slight translate-x-1 on hover for list items.
interactions_and_motion.transitions: Use 'transition-all duration-200 ease-in-out' on interactive elements.

icons.instructions: Assign a distinct but monochromatic Phosphor icon to each of the 18+ actions to aid scanning without relying on chaotic colors.

testing.requirements: All buttons, nav items, and table rows must have a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Read and apply all color variables using the provided #0f1825 base.
2. Move the 8+ header navigation links into a Shadcn Dropdown Menu attached to the user avatar.
3. Refactor the 18+ button grid into the categorized Bento layout defined in 'quick_actions_bento'.
4. Strip out the 'candy store' multi-color buttons. Use the subtle, dark monochromatic button_style provided.
5. Implement 'Manrope' for headings and 'IBM Plex Sans' for body text. Ensure strict adherence to text size maximums.
6. Use Shadcn Table for the Notarization Requests list.
7. Integrate the provided Unsplash/Pexels URLs exactly where specified.
